Name: corporations
Description:
Equipment Rating: Average (Mercenaries)

Corporations care about the bottom line, which has advantages and disadvantages for mercenaries.  On the one hand, corporate executives recognize mercenaries as fellow independent businessmen and generally treat them with a degree of professional courtesy. On the other hand, they carefully weigh costs and benefits in every negotiation.
ReputationStatements: Northern trade reliability must be preserved. You are tasked with enforcement.

MissionSuccessStatements: The board approved this operation reluctantly. They'll be much more enthusiastic in hindsight.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: The losses are unfortunate. The restraint of those losses is appreciated.
BadFaithFailureStatements: We hired your company to protect our interests. Instead, you've become one of our liabilities.
